camp_musician_guide_2026.page_title: 3rd Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp — Musician Guide
camp_musician_guide_2026.seo_description: Internal guide page for musicians and staff participating in the 3rd Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp.
camp_musician_guide_2026.hero_subtitle: 3rd Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp "Let's end the war!"
camp_musician_guide_2026.private_banner_body: This page is a private guide not indexed by search engines. It contains sensitive information including personal contacts and accommodation assignments. Please take care not to share this outside of participants.
camp_musician_guide_2026.overview_rain_note: ※ In case of rain, events will be held simultaneously across two venues: Halmangmul Restaurant & Café.
camp_musician_guide_2026.lineup_rain_note: ※ In case of rain, the performance timetable will be shared separately at a later date.
camp_musician_guide_2026.access_transport_before: If using public transportation, take the 600 limousine bus from Gate 5 at Jeju Airport and
camp_musician_guide_2026.access_lodging_separate_note: ※ Accommodation details for Ganggahimalaya and Samgakjeonpasa will be shared separately.
access_meal_items: 6/4–6/8: One meal per day and after-party snacks provided for staff and musicians
camp_musician_guide_2026.guidelines_box_body: Please review the behavioral commitments and reporting/response procedures for a safe and equitable camp.
